sprints.name: Sprint 26.05 — AI Assistant Refactor
sprints.goal: Refactor the AI assistant architecture to improve response latency and add context memory

sprints.name: Sprint 26.04 — Foundation
sprints.goal: Set up project scaffolding and CI/CD pipeline

tasks.title: Design new agent intent classification module
tasks.description: Create the rule-based intent classifier with keyword matching and entity extraction

tasks.title: Implement SQLite schema with SQLAlchemy 2.0
tasks.description: Set up all tables: sprints, members, tasks, daily_logs, retros, ratings, agent_messages, config

tasks.title: Build FastAPI routers for sprint and tasks
tasks.description: CRUD endpoints for sprint and task management with filtering and bulk updates

tasks.title: Implement standup batch submit endpoint
tasks.description: Allow multiple team members to submit daily logs in a single transaction

tasks.title: Add retro voting and rating system
tasks.description: Implement retro item categories (liked/disliked/action) with votes and dimension ratings

tasks.title: Create import/export and reset services
tasks.description: Build services to export full DB to JSON and reset from init.json

tasks.title: Write QA test suite for API endpoints
tasks.description: Test all endpoints with pytest and httpx async client

tasks.title: Setup CORS and frontend integration test
tasks.description: Enable CORS for frontend development and verify API connectivity

tasks.title: Implement agent context builder
tasks.description: Build context object with current sprint, recent tasks, and team members for the agent

tasks.title: Design responsive dashboard layout
tasks.description: Wireframe the main dashboard with sprint stats, task board, and team view

daily_logs.completed: Completed intent classification module design. Started FastAPI routers.
daily_logs.planned: Finish sprint and task router CRUD. Begin agent context builder.

daily_logs.completed: SQLite schema fully implemented. Standup batch endpoint in progress.
daily_logs.planned: Complete batch submit. Start import/export service.

daily_logs.completed: Reviewed DB schema and initial test plan. Updated QA checklist.
daily_logs.planned: Start writing pytest suite once task endpoints are ready.
daily_logs.blockers: Waiting for task-003 and task-004 to be completed before starting tests.

daily_logs.completed: Facilitated sprint planning refinement. Updated dashboard wireframes.
daily_logs.planned: Define retro voting criteria. Review PRs from Alex and Jordan.

daily_logs.completed: Finished intent classifier prototype with 7 intent categories.
daily_logs.planned: Design review with team. Begin router implementation.

daily_logs.completed: Set up SQLAlchemy 2.0 declarative models and relationships.
daily_logs.planned: Create Pydantic schemas and CRUD layer for all entities.

daily_logs.completed: Researched existing NLP approaches for lightweight intent classification.
daily_logs.planned: Draft rule-based classifier without external NLP libraries.

daily_logs.completed: Reviewed FastAPI best practices and SQLAlchemy 2.0 migration guide.
daily_logs.planned: Start database models and schema design.

retros.item: Daily standups were concise and actionable
CI/CD pipeline reduced deployment friction significantly
Some stories were too large and spilled over
Code review turnaround time was occasionally slow
Break down stories into smaller tasks during planning
Set 24-hour SLA for code review requests

agent_messages.content: Sprint Agent initialized. I can help you manage tasks, check sprint stats, log standups, and submit retros.
Sprint 'Sprint 26.05 — AI Assistant Refactor': 2/10 tasks done, 13/37 SP.
